brief.headline_en: UPC Case Law Maturation and PMAC Mediation Launch
brief.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，UPC通过年报及新程序规则展现高效透明。PMAC调解机制上线，为SEP纠纷提供ADR新路径。司法实践上，等同原则、功能性限定及临时禁令标准趋于严格，强调单一产品比对与程序合规。企业需警惕官网声明风险，利用撤诉规则优化成本，并建立严格的期限管理机制以应对日益成熟的欧洲专利诉讼环境。
key_points: PMAC程序规则获批且系统上线，为单一专利及SEP/FRAND纠纷提供官方调解与仲裁渠道，降低维权成本。
司法裁判趋严：等同判定具累积性，临时禁令要求证明单一产品侵权，功能性限定可能扩大直接侵权范围。
程序合规至关重要：上诉期自附理由判决日起算，登录系统不视为应诉，但逾期或违规将导致权利丧失。
actions: 评估引入PMAC调解机制处理潜在SEP纠纷，同时核查专利在参与国的公约状态以确保单一效力。
优化对欧出口硬件的权利要求排查，避免功能性描述陷阱；慎用官网合法性声明以防强制公示判决。
建立UPC诉讼期限双重核查机制，善用“可原谅错误”条款救济，并在上诉阶段灵活利用撤诉规则和解。
watchlist: 关注赫尔辛基、杜塞尔多夫等核心分院在等同原则与权利要求解释上的早期判例固化趋势。
监测行政委员会后续是否就PMAC运作及诉讼费退还等新规出台更明确的配套执行口径。
追踪UPC在FRAND许可意愿认定及暂停执行效力（如保证金门槛）方面的具体裁量标准变化。
brief.summary_en: During the first half of 2026, the Unified Patent Court demonstrated increased operational efficiency through its annual report and new procedural frameworks. The Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre officially launched its case management system, providing a structured alternative dispute resolution pathway for standard-essential patent and cross-border conflicts. Judicial practice has become more rigorous regarding equivalence doctrines, functional claim limitations, and provisional measure standards. Courts emphasize single-product infringement analysis and strict procedural compliance. Rights holders must carefully manage public statements to avoid adverse evidentiary consequences and utilize withdrawal mechanisms to optimize litigation costs. Establishing robust deadline management systems is essential to navigate this evolving enforcement landscape effectively.
key_points_en: The Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre adopted procedural rules and launched its digital platform, offering mediation and arbitration services for European and Unitary Patent...
Judicial standards are tightening: equivalence findings require cumulative criteria satisfaction, provisional measures demand proof of single-product infringement, and broad functi...
Procedural compliance is critical: appeal periods commence from the reasoned judgment date, passive system access does not constitute entering an appearance, and failures to meet d...
actions_en: Evaluate the Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre for resolving potential SEP disputes and verify that patents cover all participating member states to ensure valid unitary effe...
Review export hardware claims to avoid pitfalls associated with functional descriptions and exercise caution regarding website legality statements to prevent mandatory publication...
Implement dual verification for UPC litigation deadlines, leverage 'excusable error' provisions for relief where appropriate, and strategically use withdrawal rules during appeals...
watchlist_en: Monitor early precedent consolidation in core divisions such as Helsinki and Düsseldorf regarding equivalence principles and claim construction methodologies.
Track whether the Administrative Committee issues further guidance on Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre operations and fee reimbursement procedures.
Observe developments in FRAND willingness assessments and specific discretionary standards for suspending enforcement effects, including security deposit thresholds.

items.title: Unified Patent Court published the 2025 annual report
items.title_zh: 统一专利法院发布2025年度报告
items.title_en: Unified Patent Court Publishes 2025 Annual Report Highlighting Case Management System Launch
items.summary: The UPC published its second annual report
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）发布第二份年度报告，回顾其成立三年来的活动、案件量及关键成就。报告强调新案件管理系统（CMS）的成功上线是重要里程碑，体现了与欧洲专利局及用户组织的紧密合作。法院高层指出，UPC已巩固其作为领先知识产权诉讼论坛的地位，致力于在技术快速进步背景下提供高质量、及时的判决，并持续加强判例法发展及利益相关方沟通。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court (UPC) has released its second annual report, reviewing activities, caseload, and key achievements from 2025. The report highlights the successful launch of a new Case Management System as a major milestone, demonstrating effective cooperation between the UPC, the European Patent Office, and user organizations. Court leadership emphasized the institution's growing position as a leading IP litigation forum, focusing on developing case law, ensuring transparency, and delivering high-quality decisions within competitive timeframes despite an increasing workload.
items.ai_insight_zh: UPC运作日趋成熟，诉讼效率与透明度提升将增加其在欧专利纠纷中的吸引力。中国企业应密切关注其判例法发展及新系统对程序的影响，优化在欧洲的专利布局与维权策略，利用其高效机制应对潜在侵权风险或发起进攻性诉讼。
items.ai_insight_en: The publication of the second annual report signals the UPC's transition into a mature judicial institution with established procedural frameworks. For rights holders and legal practitioners, the emphasis on the new Case Management System and consistent delivery of judgments suggests increasing procedural predictability. This development reinforces the UPC's viability as a central venue for European patent disputes, warranting close attention to its evolving jurisprudence and administrative capabilities.

items.title: PMAC’s procedural rules adopted by the Administrative Committee
items.title_zh: UPC行政委员会批准PMAC程序规则
items.title_en: UPC Administrative Committee Adopts PMAC Procedural Rules for Mediation and Arbitration
items.summary: The procedural rules of the Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC) of the Unified Patent Court (UPC) were formally approved and adopted by the Administrative Committee on the 24 April 2026
items.ai_summary_zh: 2026年4月24日，统一专利法院（UPC）行政委员会正式批准专利调解与仲裁中心（PMAC）的程序规则。PMAC将提供调解、仲裁及专家裁定等争议解决服务，涵盖欧洲专利、单一专利及相关跨境纠纷，包括SEP/FRAND案件。预计5月启动调解服务，年内陆续开放其他服务。此举标志着UPC体系下替代性争议解决机制的正式确立，为权利人提供了诉讼之外的多元化纠纷处理路径。
items.ai_summary_en: On 24 April 2026, the Administrative Committee of the Unified Patent Court (UPC) formally approved the procedural rules for the Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC). This adoption enables PMAC to provide dispute resolution services including mediation, arbitration, expert determination, and hybrid processes. The Centre will handle disputes concerning European and Unitary Patents, as well as related cross-border matters and SEP/FRAND cases. Mediation services are scheduled to commence in May 2026, with arbitration and expert determination services to follow later in the year. Full texts of the rules and fee schedules are available on the PMAC and UPC websites.
items.ai_insight_en: The establishment of PMAC's operational framework provides rights holders with structured non-litigation pathways within the UPC ecosystem. For portfolio managers, this introduces viable options for resolving SEP/FRAND negotiations and cross-border conflicts outside traditional court proceedings. Monitoring the rollout of these services is essential for understanding how alternative dispute resolution may complement or alter current enforcement strategies in Europe.

items.title: PMAC's Case Management System now live
items.title_zh: PMAC案件管理系统正式上线
items.title_en: UPC's PMAC Launches Case Management System for Mediation and Arbitration
items.summary: As of today, 12 May 2026, the Case Management System of the Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC) is live
items.ai_summary_zh: 2026年5月12日，统一专利法院（UPC）宣布其专利调解与仲裁中心（PMAC）的案件管理系统（CCMS）正式启用。该系统支持用户在线提交替代性争议解决（ADR）信息及调解程序请求。PMAC网站已设立专门页面提供系统使用指南。此举标志着UPC在优化专利纠纷非诉讼解决机制方面迈出重要一步，为当事人提供了更便捷的调解与仲裁服务渠道，有助于提高争议解决效率并降低诉讼成本。
items.ai_summary_en: As of 12 May 2026, the Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC) has officially launched its Case Management System (CCMS). This digital platform enables parties to submit requests for ADR information sessions and mediation proceedings directly through the Centre. The PMAC website now features a dedicated section providing practical guidance on navigating the new system. This development marks the operational availability of structured alternative dispute resolution services under the Unified Patent Court framework, offering a streamlined digital interface for initiating non-litigious patent dispute resolutions.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧遭遇专利纠纷时，应关注并利用PMAC的调解与仲裁机制。相比UPC诉讼，ADR程序通常更具成本效益且保密性强。建议企业熟悉CCMS操作流程，在争议初期评估通过调解快速和解的可能性，以规避高昂的跨国诉讼风险并维护商业关系。
items.ai_insight_en: The launch of the PMAC Case Management System provides rights holders with a formalized digital channel for accessing alternative dispute resolution mechanisms within the UPC ecosystem. For in-house counsel and IP teams managing European portfolios, this infrastructure supports efficient initiation of mediation or arbitration without immediate recourse to full litigation. Monitoring the uptake and procedural rules of this system will help stakeholders evaluate its utility for resolving cross-border patent disputes efficiently.

items.title: LD Helsinki, April 29, 2026, Decision On Infringement And Validity, UPC_CFI_214/2023, UPC_CFI_403/2025
items.title_zh: UPC赫尔辛基分院：专利侵权与有效性裁决及等同原则适用
items.title_en: UPC Helsinki Applies Hague Equivalence Approach and Limits Revocation Scope in EP 3 295 663 Decision
items.summary: The Helsinki Local Division of the Unified Patent Court examined infringement proceedings involving EP 3 295 663, with AIM Sport Development AG asserting patent rights against multiple TGI Sport entities across European jurisdictions. The case included a counterclaim for revocation, requiring the court to analyze validity under Articles 54, 56, and 123(2) EPC alongside infringement claims under Article 69 EPC.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）赫尔辛基地方分院就EP 3 295 663号专利作出侵权与有效性判决。在缺乏上诉法院先例时，法院采纳海牙分院的等同侵权判定路径，强调等同标准需累积满足，任一不成立即无侵权。针对撤销反诉，法院指出若当事人未充分论证“新增事项”，仅需回应已 substantiated 的部分。该案明确了UPC内部司法一致性的重要性及举证责任边界。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court's Helsinki Local Division issued a decision on infringement and validity concerning European patent EP 3 295 663, held by AIM Sport Development AG against multiple TGI Sport entities. In the absence of Court of Appeal precedent on equivalence, the Division adopted the approach established by The Hague Local Division, emphasizing that equivalence criteria are cumulative; failure to meet any single criterion precludes a finding of infringement. Regarding the counterclaim for revocation based on added matter under Article 123(2) EPC, the Court ruled it would only address arguments substantiated by the defendant, noting that TGI provided minimal detail and did not further develop this allegation during oral proceedings.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在应对UPC诉讼时，需密切关注各地方分院对等同原则的司法倾向，尤其是海牙、赫尔辛基等关键分院。在提出无效抗辩时，必须提供详尽的技术比对与法律论证，避免仅凭形式主张导致被驳回。建议建立跨法域的专利风险预警机制，统一应诉策略以应对UPC日益增强的判例约束力。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment reinforces the importance of judicial consistency across UPC Local Divisions, particularly regarding the doctrine of equivalents. It signals that applicants and defendants must provide robust, substantiated technical and legal arguments for invalidity defenses, as courts will not expand the scope of review beyond what is rigorously pleaded. This highlights the need for precise drafting of counterclaims and careful selection of equivalence frameworks in litigation strategy.

items.title: Where Should Cases Go? Or Where Should Patent Law Be Made?
items.title_zh: 案件去向与法律制定：统一专利法院案件分配的制度反思
items.title_en: UPC Case Distribution: Where Litigation Concentrates and Patent Law Is Formed
items.summary: "Gedanken ohne Inhalt sind leer, Anschauungen ohne Begriffe sind blind." — Immanuel Kant (Thoughts without content are empty, intuitions without concepts are blind.)
items.ai_summary_zh: 本文回应关于统一专利法院（UPC）案件分配过于抽象的批评，指出问题核心在于案件集中是否扭曲了UPC法的形成条件。尽管案件集中于特定分部反映了用户信心与可预测性，但法院并非市场，其产出是法律。若法律实践仅由少数中心通过重复程序塑造，将导致早期教义固化。作者主张需审视这种由用户偏好驱动的自强化均衡，因其可能非中性地决定未来专利法的结构与发展路径。
items.ai_summary_en: This commentary addresses concerns that UPC case distribution debates remain too abstract. It argues the core issue is whether concentrating cases in specific local divisions affects how UPC law is formed. While concentration reflects user confidence and predictability, a court produces law rather than merely allocating market demand. If legal practice is shaped by repeated procedures in a limited number of divisions, early doctrines may become entrenched. The self-reinforcing equilibrium driven by user choice requires scrutiny to ensure it does not non-neutrally determine the future structure of European patent law.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业应密切关注UPC主要分部的司法倾向，因早期判例将深远影响后续诉讼策略。建议避免盲目追随热门法庭，需综合评估各分部的程序效率与文化差异，以规避因‘胜者通吃’效应导致的法律解释单一化风险，优化全球专利布局与应诉策略。
items.ai_insight_en: For rights holders and counsel, understanding the structural impact of case concentration is vital for long-term portfolio strategy. The reliance on predictable divisions offers immediate procedural advantages but carries the risk of shaping a uniform legal interpretation through limited judicial perspectives. Monitoring this dynamic helps anticipate shifts in legal doctrine formation within the new unified system.

items.ai_core_points_en: ["Case concentration in certain UPC divisions reflects user confidence but raises questions about how law is systematically formed.", "Courts produce legal precedents, meaning concentrated procedural environments can entrench early judicial doctrines.", "User-driven case distribution creates a self-reinforcing equilibrium that structurally influences future patent law development."]

items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Concentrated litigation venues influence the evolution of UPC jurisprudence, affecting long-term enforcement predictability.", "Practice note: Evaluate divisional differences beyond speed to understand how repeated practices may solidify specific legal interpretations.", "What to monitor: Track whether self-reinforcing case distribution leads to the entrenchment of early doctrinal positions in key divisions."]
core_points_en: Case concentration in certain UPC divisions reflects user confidence but raises questions about how law is systematically formed.
Courts produce legal precedents, meaning concentrated procedural environments can entrench early judicial doctrines.
User-driven case distribution creates a self-reinforcing equilibrium that structurally influences future patent law development.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Concentrated litigation venues influence the evolution of UPC jurisprudence, affecting long-term enforcement predictability.
Practice note: Evaluate divisional differences beyond speed to understand how repeated practices may solidify specific legal interpretations.
What to monitor: Track whether self-reinforcing case distribution leads to the entrenchment of early doctrinal positions in key divisions.

items.title: LD Hamburg, April 27, 2026, Decision, UPC_CFI_685/2024, UPC_CFI_157/2025
items.title_zh: UPC汉堡地院：辅助请求数量及权利要求宽泛解释影响新颖性
items.title_en: UPC Hamburg: Admissibility of Auxiliary Requests and Impact of Broad Claim Construction on Novelty
items.summary: The Local Division Hamburg of the Unified Patent Court examined infringement and revocation claims involving EP 2 077 811, a patent held by Teleflex Life Sciences II LLC and challenged by Speed Care Mineral GmbH. The proceedings addressed questions of patent validity under multiple European Patent Convention articles and the application of the Rules of Procedure in cross-border patent disputes across ten European jurisdictions.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）汉堡地方法院审理了Teleflex诉Speed Care案，涉及EP 2 077 811专利的侵权与无效。法院裁定在面临多重有效性挑战时，多达51项的辅助请求可被允许；但被告若已知理由却延迟提出反诉，将因缺乏勤勉而被驳回。此外，法院对“粘土材料”等术语进行宽泛的功能性解释，虽利于认定侵权，但也扩大了现有技术范围，导致专利新颖性丧失。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court Local Division Hamburg addressed infringement and revocation claims concerning EP 2 077 811, held by Teleflex Life Sciences II LLC against Speed Care Mineral GmbH. The decision clarified procedural standards under the Rules of Procedure, ruling that up to 51 auxiliary requests may be admissible when facing diverse validity challenges. However, late amendments to counterclaims were rejected due to lack of diligence. Crucially, the court applied a broad functional interpretation to terms like 'clay material' and 'binder,' which expanded the prior art base and resulted in a finding of lack of novelty.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在应对UPC诉讼时，应注重程序策略的严谨性，避免以已知理由延迟抗辩。同时，需警惕权利要求宽泛解释带来的风险，在撰写和修改权利要求时平衡保护范围与新颖性，避免因功能性限定过宽而引入不利现有技术，确保专利稳定性。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment highlights critical procedural and substantive risks in UPC litigation. Rights holders must balance claim breadth with stability, as functional definitions may inadvertently expand the relevant prior art. Defendants must exercise strict diligence in filing counterclaims, ensuring all known grounds are raised promptly to avoid rejection. The acceptance of numerous auxiliary requests suggests courts will accommodate complex validity defenses, requiring robust preparation from both parties.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["面对复杂有效性挑战时，大量辅助请求可能被视为可接受", "被告延迟提出已知理由的反诉，因缺乏勤勉将被驳回", "宽泛的功能性权利要求解释可能扩大现有技术从而破坏新颖性"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["High numbers of auxiliary requests are admissible if justified by complex technology and multiple distinct validity attacks such as novelty or inventive step.", "Late amendments to counterclaims for revocation are rejected if the defendant fails to demonstrate reasonable diligence under Rule 263(2)(a) RoP.", "Broad functional claim construction can widen the scope of anticipating prior art, potentially destroying patent novelty despite aiding infringement findings."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["UPC诉讼需严守程序时限，避免以已知理由延迟抗辩", "平衡权利要求范围与新颖性，警惕宽泛解释引入现有技术"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Broad functional claim language increases infringement potential but significantly raises novelty risks by expanding the prior art search field.", "Practice note: Ensure counterclaims include all known validity grounds early; failure to do so demonstrates lack of diligence under Rule 263(2)(a) RoP.", "What to monitor: How other UPC divisions apply similar diligence standards for late amendments and interpret functional claim terms in cross-border disputes."]
core_points_en: High numbers of auxiliary requests are admissible if justified by complex technology and multiple distinct validity attacks such as novelty or inventive step.
Late amendments to counterclaims for revocation are rejected if the defendant fails to demonstrate reasonable diligence under Rule 263(2)(a) RoP.
Broad functional claim construction can widen the scope of anticipating prior art, potentially destroying patent novelty despite aiding infringement findings.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Broad functional claim language increases infringement potential but significantly raises novelty risks by expanding the prior art search field.
Practice note: Ensure counterclaims include all known validity grounds early; failure to do so demonstrates lack of diligence under Rule 263(2)(a) RoP.
What to monitor: How other UPC divisions apply similar diligence standards for late amendments and interpret functional claim terms in cross-border disputes.

items.title: Unified Patent Court Insights: Claim Construction
items.title_zh: UPC杜塞尔多夫分院：打印机供墨容器权利要求解释与侵权判定
items.title_en: UPC Düsseldorf: Functional Language Defines Product Claim Scope Without External Apparatus
items.summary: A recent decision from the Düsseldorf Local Division in UPC_CFI_351/2024 provides an interesting look at the Unified Patent Court's (UPC) evolving approach to claim construction and the role...
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）杜塞尔多夫地方法院在UPC_CFI_351/2024案中裁定，描述为“可拆卸安装”的打印机供墨容器属于产品权利要求而非系统权利要求。法院认定“可安装”仅界定产品适用性，不要求外部设备存在。因此，被告单独销售的墨盒构成直接侵权。该判决明确了功能性语言在权利要求解释中的作用，区分了产品与系统权利要求的边界，对后续类似案件的侵权判定具有指导意义。
items.ai_summary_en: In UPC_CFI_351/2024, the Düsseldorf Local Division clarified the distinction between product and system claims regarding a printer supply container. The court rejected the argument that the term 'detachably mountable' required the presence of the receiving apparatus (printer) for infringement. Instead, it ruled that such functional language defines the product's suitability for intended use. Consequently, standalone toner bottles were found to directly infringe the patent as product claims, establishing that external components need not be present to realize the invention's boundaries.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国出口企业需警惕单一零部件在UPC被认定为直接侵权的风险。在撰写欧洲专利时，应审慎使用“可安装”等功能性限定，避免将产品权利要求不当扩大至系统层面。建议针对核心组件进行独立权利要求布局，并在出口前进行FTO分析，评估单独销售行为在UPC体系下的侵权可能性，以规避高额赔偿风险。
items.ai_insight_en: This ruling underscores the importance of precise claim drafting when using functional language in European patents. Rights holders should note that product claims with suitability-based limitations may offer broader enforcement potential against standalone components compared to system claims. Conversely, defendants must carefully assess whether functional terms imply a requirement for multi-part systems or merely describe interoperability features of a single article.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["法院裁定“可安装”界定产品适用性，无需外部设备存在即构成侵权", "明确区分产品权利要求与系统权利要求，单独销售组件可直接侵权", "确立UPC在功能性语言解释上的倾向，强化专利权人对配套产品的保护"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The court interpreted 'mountable' as defining product suitability rather than requiring the physical presence of an external apparatus.", "Standalone components sold separately can constitute direct infringement if they meet the functional criteria of a product claim.", "The decision clarifies the boundary between product and system claims under the Unified Patent Court's evolving jurisprudence."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["警惕单一零部件在UPC被认定为直接侵权的法律风险", "优化欧洲专利权利要求布局，审慎使用功能性限定语言"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Standalone components may face direct infringement liability even if the final system is not assembled by the seller.", "Practice note: Drafters should distinguish clearly between product suitability and system integration requirements in claim language.", "What to monitor: Further UPC decisions refining the interpretation of functional limitations like 'capable of' or 'mountable' in mixed-type claims."]
core_points_en: The court interpreted 'mountable' as defining product suitability rather than requiring the physical presence of an external apparatus.
Standalone components sold separately can constitute direct infringement if they meet the functional criteria of a product claim.
The decision clarifies the boundary between product and system claims under the Unified Patent Court's evolving jurisprudence.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Standalone components may face direct infringement liability even if the final system is not assembled by the seller.
Practice note: Drafters should distinguish clearly between product suitability and system integration requirements in claim language.
What to monitor: Further UPC decisions refining the interpretation of functional limitations like 'capable of' or 'mountable' in mixed-type claims.

items.title: UPC: Supplementing Expert Opinion After Inspection Not Possible
items.title_zh: UPC杜塞尔多夫分部裁定：检查后不得补充专家意见
items.title_en: UPC Düsseldorf Division Denies Supplementary Expert Opinion Following Ex-Parte Inspection
items.summary: The Düsseldorf local division of the Unified Patent Court has ruled on a defendant's request for a supplementary expert opinion following an ex-parte inspection order.
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC杜塞尔多夫地方法院在UPC_CFI_1325/2025案中裁定，驳回被告要求法院委任专家就单方证据保全出具补充意见的请求。法院指出，被告可通过《程序规则》第197.3条申请审查以保障程序权利，且该专家非第187条规定的“法院专家”，无法律依据支持补充报告。证据保全旨在快速获取信息以决定是否起诉，实质准确性异议应在后续主程序中提出。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court’s Düsseldorf local division rejected a defendant’s request for a supplementary expert opinion after an ex-parte evidence preservation order. In case UPC_CFI_1325/2025, the panel held that no legal basis existed for such a supplement, distinguishing the court-commissioned inspector from a formal ‘court expert’ under Rule 187 of the Rules of Procedure. The court emphasized that evidence preservation aims to provide prompt information for assessing further action, with substantive accuracy challenges reserved for main proceedings. While denying the request, the judges noted specific technical questions regarding the expert’s sketches and access to protective letters, indicating these issues may be revisited during subsequent litigation.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧遭遇单方证据保全时，应聚焦于利用Rule 197.3申请审查而非纠缠补充报告。需重视保全阶段的策略应对，因实质抗辩将延至主程序。建议提前准备技术对比分析，确保在主程序中有效反驳专家初步结论，避免程序被动。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision clarifies the procedural boundaries between expedited evidence preservation and full merits adjudication at the UPC. Rights holders and defendants should recognize that ex-parte inspections are designed for speed, not finality. Challenges to technical findings must be strategically deferred to the main action. However, courts may still record specific factual queries during preservation, which can influence later stages if not adequately addressed in the primary litigation phase.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["驳回单方保全后补充专家意见请求，明确缺乏法律依据", "区分法院委任专家与法定法院专家，排除当事人评论权", "保全程序侧重效率，实体争议留待主程序解决"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The court denied the request for a supplementary expert report, finding no legal basis under the Rules of Procedure for such an addition post-inspection.", "The appointed expert was not classified as a 'court expert' under Rule 187 RoP, meaning parties lacked the procedural right to comment on the initial report.", "Substantive objections to the detailed description or technical accuracy must be raised in subsequent main proceedings rather than during preservation."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["善用Rule 197.3申请审查替代补充专家意见诉求", "将实质性技术抗辩保留至主程序阶段集中发力"]

The appointed expert was not classified as a 'court expert' under Rule 187 RoP, meaning parties lacked the procedural right to comment on the initial report.

items.title: UPC Ruling Defines The Limits Of Unitary Patent Protection
items.title_zh: UPC 裁决界定单一专利保护的适用极限
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal Clarifies Strict Territorial Scope for Unitary Patent Effect
items.summary: The Unified Patent Court system offers streamlined patent protection across multiple European jurisdictions, but understanding its mechanisms and strategic implications remains crucial for rights holders.
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC 上诉院确认，欧洲专利若要在所有参与成员国获得单一效力，必须在各国拥有完全相同的权利要求集。因马耳他于申请日后才加入欧洲专利公约，导致涉案专利无法覆盖该国，故被驳回单一效力请求。法院坚持严格解释法规，拒绝因地域缺失非权利人可控而给予灵活性。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court (UPC) Court of Appeal has confirmed that a European patent qualifies for unitary effect only if it covers all participating member states with an identical set of claims. In case UPC_CoA_8/2026, the Court upheld the European Patent Office's refusal to grant unitary effect where the patent did not cover Malta. Because Malta was not a party to the European Patent Convention at the application's filing date in 2005, it could not be designated. The Court rejected arguments for flexibility regarding circumstances beyond the proprietor's control, establishing that strict territorial coverage is a mandatory condition for unitary protection.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧申请专利时，需严格核查目标国在优先权日或申请日的公约成员状态。对于涉及新加入成员国的分案申请，应评估单一专利路径的可行性，避免因部分国家缺失导致整体单一效力失效，必要时考虑传统生效模式。
items.ai_insight_en: This ruling establishes a rigid boundary for unitary patent eligibility, impacting portfolio strategies for rights holders with older priority dates or complex divisional histories. It underscores that the unitary system does not accommodate historical gaps in EPC membership, requiring precise alignment between the patent's territorial scope and the current list of participating states at the time of request.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["单一效力要求专利在所有参与国具有完全相同的权利要求集", "申请日前未加入公约的成员国（如马耳他）导致无法获得单一保护", "UPC 上诉院拒绝因客观情况排除领土而放宽单一效力的法定条件"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Unitary effect requires a European patent to cover all participating member states with an identical set of claims in each jurisdiction.", "Patents filed before a country's accession to the EPC cannot include that state, potentially disqualifying them from unitary protection.", "The UPC Court of Appeal refused to allow flexibility for missing territories caused by historical accession dates or procedural constraints."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["核查申请日各国公约状态，避免因地域缺失丧失单一效力", "针对特定国家缺口，提前规划传统验证与单一专利的组合策略"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Rights holders must verify whether all participating UPC states were EPC members on the relevant filing date to ensure unitary eligibility.", "Practice note: For divisional applications or patents with early priority dates, assess if historical non-membership of specific states precludes unitary effect.", "What to monitor: Future interpretations of 'identical claims' and potential legislative adjustments regarding transitional cases involving new EPC members."]
core_points_en: Unitary effect requires a European patent to cover all participating member states with an identical set of claims in each jurisdiction.
Patents filed before a country's accession to the EPC cannot include that state, potentially disqualifying them from unitary protection.
The UPC Court of Appeal refused to allow flexibility for missing territories caused by historical accession dates or procedural constraints.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders must verify whether all participating UPC states were EPC members on the relevant filing date to ensure unitary eligibility.
Practice note: For divisional applications or patents with early priority dates, assess if historical non-membership of specific states precludes unitary effect.
What to monitor: Future interpretations of 'identical claims' and potential legislative adjustments regarding transitional cases involving new EPC members.

items.title: Court Of Appeal, March 27, 2026, Decision, UPC_CoA_409/2025, UPC_CoA_410/2025, UPC_CoA_420/2025
items.title_zh: 统一专利法院裁定登录系统不构成应诉管辖
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal: CMS Login Does Not Constitute Entering an Appearance Under Brussels Ia
items.summary: Logging into the UPC's Case Management System does not constitute an "entering of an appearance" to establish jurisdiction under the Brussels Ia Regulation.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院上诉庭在涉及 NUC Electronics 与 Hurom 的案件中裁定，被告仅登录案件管理系统查看文件，不构成《布鲁塞尔条例 Ia》意义上的“出庭应诉”。法院指出，确立管辖权需被告采取实质性步骤，如提交初步异议或答辩状，单纯访问不足以视为对法院管辖权的自愿接受或争议确认。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court Court of Appeal ruled that merely logging into the Case Management System to access case files does not amount to 'entering an appearance' under Article 26(1) of the Brussels Ia Regulation. The decision clarifies that passive file access lacks the deliberate choice required to establish jurisdiction. Jurisdiction is only confirmed when a defendant takes active procedural steps, such as filing a Preliminary Objection regarding jurisdiction or submitting a Statement of Defence on the merits. This distinction prevents accidental submission to UPC jurisdiction through routine administrative access.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在应对 UPC 诉讼时，切勿因登录查看案情而误判为已应诉。应严格把控首次提交文件的时机与内容，避免因程序性操作不当导致丧失管辖权异议权利，需由专业律师评估后采取行动。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment provides critical clarity for rights holders and defendants managing cross-border patent disputes within the UPC framework. It confirms that preliminary case assessment activities, such as reviewing documents in the digital system, do not inadvertently waive jurisdictional objections. Legal teams can safely monitor proceedings without fear of accidental submission, provided they refrain from filing substantive responses before deciding on their jurisdictional strategy.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["仅登录 UPC 系统查看文件不视为法律意义上的出庭应诉行为", "确立管辖权需提交初步异议或实体答辩等实质性诉讼步骤", "明确区分被动查阅与主动抗辩，防止管辖权被意外确立"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Passive access to UPC case files via the Case Management System does not constitute entering an appearance under Brussels Ia Regulation.", "Establishing jurisdiction requires active procedural steps, specifically filing a Preliminary Objection or a Statement of Defence.", "The ruling distinguishes between mere file inspection and the deliberate legal choice to submit to the court's international jurisdiction."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["登录系统查阅卷宗不会触发管辖权，企业可安全进行初步评估", "首次提交异议或答辩状是确立管辖的关键节点，须谨慎决策"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Rights holders can review UPC case materials without risking accidental acceptance of the court's jurisdiction under EU regulations.", "Practice note: Ensure no substantive filings are made until a formal decision on jurisdictional challenges or defense strategy is finalized.", "What to monitor: Future interpretations of what constitutes an 'active step' beyond standard pleadings that might trigger jurisdictional consent."]
core_points_en: Passive access to UPC case files via the Case Management System does not constitute entering an appearance under Brussels Ia Regulation.
Establishing jurisdiction requires active procedural steps, specifically filing a Preliminary Objection or a Statement of Defence.
The ruling distinguishes between mere file inspection and the deliberate legal choice to submit to the court's international jurisdiction.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders can review UPC case materials without risking accidental acceptance of the court's jurisdiction under EU regulations.
Practice note: Ensure no substantive filings are made until a formal decision on jurisdictional challenges or defense strategy is finalized.
What to monitor: Future interpretations of what constitutes an 'active step' beyond standard pleadings that might trigger jurisdictional consent.

items.title: Düsseldorf LD, March 18, 2026, Decision On Infringement Action And Counterclaim For Revocation, UPC_CFI_135/2024, UPC_CFI_477/2024
items.title_zh: UPC 杜塞尔多夫分院就 Dolby 诉 Beko 案作出侵权与无效反诉判决
items.title_en: UPC Düsseldorf: Dominant Position in FRAND Context and Implementer's Willingness
items.summary: The Düsseldorf Local Division held that a dominant position within the meaning of Article 102 TFEU may arise if smart TVs complying with a common standard...
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）杜塞尔多夫地方法院在 Dolby 诉 Beko 案中裁定，若符合标准的智能电视无许可无法上市，专利权人可能拥有市场支配地位。法院强调，若实施者未在 FRAND 谈判初期表明许可意愿，则无需审查专利权人报价是否合规。该判决遵循华为诉中兴案框架，并与曼海姆分院立场保持一致。
items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Düsseldorf Local Division ruled that a dominant position under Article 102 TFEU may exist if standard-compliant smart TVs cannot be marketed without a license for the patent in suit, given consumer expectations for common codecs. The Court held that if an implementer fails to indicate willingness to conclude a license during initial FRAND negotiations, the patentee’s offer need not be examined for FRAND compliance. This decision aligns with the Mannheim Local Division’s approach in Panasonic v Oppo regarding the Huawei v ZTE framework.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧出口智能电视等标准产品时，须在收到侵权通知后立即明确表达许可意愿，否则将丧失 FRAND 抗辩机会。建议提前建立标准化应对流程，避免因程序瑕疵导致败诉风险。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment clarifies the threshold for establishing dominance in SEP cases involving consumer electronics and reinforces strict procedural requirements for implementers. Rights holders can rely on this to streamline enforcement against unresponsive parties, while implementers must ensure immediate, explicit responses to infringement notices to preserve FRAND defenses.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["标准合规电视若无许可无法销售，专利权人或具市场支配地位", "实施者未表许可意愿时，无需审查专利权人报价是否符合 FRAND", "判决遵循华为诉中兴框架，确认 UPC 内部裁判标准一致性"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Dominant position may arise where consumers expect standard-compliant devices to decode all common video codecs covered by the standard.", "If the infringer fails to indicate willingness to license in response to notice, the analysis of the patentee's FRAND offer ends.", "The Düsseldorf Local Division aligns its FRAND framework application with the Mannheim Local Division's precedent."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["收到侵权通知须立即书面表达许可意愿以保留抗辩权", "出口企业应预判标准必要专利风险并制定前置谈判策略"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Implementers must respond promptly to infringement notices to avoid forfeiting FRAND defenses.", "Practice note: Patentees may cease detailed FRAND offer analysis if implementers show no initial willingness to negotiate.", "What to monitor: Consistency in FRAND application across UPC Local Divisions following this alignment with Mannheim precedents."]
core_points_en: Dominant position may arise where consumers expect standard-compliant devices to decode all common video codecs covered by the standard.
If the infringer fails to indicate willingness to license in response to notice, the analysis of the patentee's FRAND offer ends.
The Düsseldorf Local Division aligns its FRAND framework application with the Mannheim Local Division's precedent.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Implementers must respond promptly to infringement notices to avoid forfeiting FRAND defenses.
Practice note: Patentees may cease detailed FRAND offer analysis if implementers show no initial willingness to negotiate.
What to monitor: Consistency in FRAND application across UPC Local Divisions following this alignment with Mannheim precedents.

items.title: Court Of Appeal, March 11, 2026, Decision, UPC_CFI_934/2025
items.title_zh: UPC 上诉法院裁定撤诉规则适用于临时措施申请
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal: Rule 265 Withdrawal Applies to Provisional Measures and Appeals
items.summary: The Court of Appeal clarified that the term "action" (Klage) in Rule 265.1 RoP encompasses applications for provisional measures.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）上诉法院在 2026 年 3 月 11 日判决中澄清，程序规则第 265 条中的“诉讼”一词涵盖临时措施申请。法院确认该撤诉机制不仅适用于侵权或无效等主诉程序，同样延伸至临时救济程序及上诉阶段。若双方达成和解且无异议，法院可准许撤诉并免除单独的费用裁决，确立了更灵活的程序退出机制。
items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Court of Appeal clarified that 'action' under Rule 265.1 RoP encompasses applications for provisional measures, not just main infringement or revocation proceedings. The Court confirmed that applicants may withdraw such interim relief requests during pending appeals, provided the withdrawal occurs before a final appellate decision. In this case, involving Roche and Menarini regarding EP 1 962 668, the parties reached an out-of-court settlement. The Court permitted the withdrawal, noting no legitimate interests opposed it. Furthermore, the Court held that a separate cost decision is unnecessary under Rule 265.2(c) when parties unanimously agree to bear their own costs.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧应对专利纠纷时，可利用此规则在上诉阶段灵活撤回临时措施申请以促成和解。建议密切关注 UPC 程序动态，在面临禁令风险时，将程序性撤诉作为谈判筹码，优化诉讼成本与商业策略的平衡。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision provides procedural clarity for rights holders and defendants engaging in UPC interim relief proceedings. It confirms that the withdrawal mechanism is available throughout the appellate phase for provisional measures, facilitating settlement negotiations even after an appeal has been lodged. The ruling on costs offers administrative efficiency, allowing parties to finalize disputes without additional judicial cost orders when mutual agreement on expense allocation exists. This flexibility supports strategic resolution of urgent patent disputes within the unified system.

items.ai_core_points_en: ["Rule 265.1 RoP's definition of 'action' extends to applications for provisional measures, allowing withdrawal in interim relief proceedings.", "Withdrawal of provisional measure applications is permissible at the appeal stage if declared before the final appellate decision is rendered.", "A separate cost decision is unnecessary under Rule 265.2(c) when parties unanimously agree that each side bears its own costs."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用撤诉规则灵活性，在上诉阶段通过程序退出让步换取商业和解空间", "明确费用分担共识可简化结案流程，降低企业在欧诉讼的时间与经济成本"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Parties seeking or opposing provisional measures can utilize withdrawal mechanisms during appeals to facilitate settlements and manage litigation exposure effect…", "Practice note: When settling interim relief disputes, explicitly agreeing to bear own costs avoids the need for a separate court cost decision, streamlining case closure.", "What to monitor: Future applications of Rule 265 in other interim contexts to assess if 'legitimate interests' exceptions are interpreted broadly by different divisions."]
core_points_en: Rule 265.1 RoP's definition of 'action' extends to applications for provisional measures, allowing withdrawal in interim relief proceedings.
Withdrawal of provisional measure applications is permissible at the appeal stage if declared before the final appellate decision is rendered.
A separate cost decision is unnecessary under Rule 265.2(c) when parties unanimously agree that each side bears its own costs.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Parties seeking or opposing provisional measures can utilize withdrawal mechanisms during appeals to facilitate settlements and manage litigation exposure effect…
Practice note: When settling interim relief disputes, explicitly agreeing to bear own costs avoids the need for a separate court cost decision, streamlining case closure.
What to monitor: Future applications of Rule 265 in other interim contexts to assess if 'legitimate interests' exceptions are interpreted broadly by different divisions.

items.title: Court Of Appeal, March 6, 2026, Decision, UPC_COA_895/2025 & UPC_COA_896/2025
items.title_zh: 统一专利法院上诉庭裁定：撤诉许可及诉讼费退还新规适用
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal Clarifies Withdrawal Rules and Fee Reimbursement Under Amended RoP
items.summary: Under R. 265.1 RoP, a party may withdraw its action as long as no final decision has been rendered. The withdrawal shall not be permitted if the other party...
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）上诉庭在 2026 年 3 月裁决中确认，若对方无异议且无合法利益，上诉人可依据程序规则第 265 条撤回上诉。同时，法院明确 2026 年生效的规则修订版将诉讼费退还比例从 60% 降至 50%，适用版本以申请退还日期为准。此外，若双方未请求，法院可在撤诉时不作出费用决定。
items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Court of Appeal confirmed that Rule 265.1 RoP permits withdrawal of appeals if the respondent consents and lacks a legitimate interest in continuation. The decision clarified that amended Rule 370.9 RoP, effective January 1, 2026, reduces fee reimbursement from 60% to 50%, with applicability determined by the date of the reimbursement application rather than the appeal filing date. Additionally, the Court declined to issue a cost decision upon withdrawal where neither party explicitly requested one, despite procedural provisions suggesting otherwise.
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment provides critical clarity on procedural mechanics for withdrawing actions at the appellate stage. Practitioners must carefully time reimbursement applications to navigate the reduced fee recovery rates introduced in 2026. Furthermore, the decision highlights that cost orders are not automatic upon withdrawal; parties must actively request them to secure formal determinations on costs, impacting overall litigation budgeting and final case resolution strategies.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["对方同意且无合法利益阻碍时，允许依据规则 265 条撤回上诉", "诉讼费退还比例降至 50%，适用版本取决于退还申请提交日期", "若当事人未请求，上诉庭在撤诉程序中可不作具体费用裁定"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Rule 265.1 RoP allows withdrawal of appeals when the respondent consents and has no legitimate interest in the action being decided.", "Amended Rule 370.9 RoP reduces fee reimbursement to 50%, applying based on the reimbursement application date after December 31, 2025.", "The Court of Appeal refrained from issuing a cost decision upon withdrawal where neither party formally requested such a determination."]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Understanding the reduced fee reimbursement rate is essential for accurate litigation cost forecasting and settlement negotiations.", "Practice note: Parties should explicitly request cost decisions during withdrawal proceedings to ensure formal resolution of financial liabilities.", "What to monitor: Future jurisprudence regarding what constitutes a 'legitimate interest' for respondents opposing withdrawal under Rule 265.1."]
core_points_en: Rule 265.1 RoP allows withdrawal of appeals when the respondent consents and has no legitimate interest in the action being decided.
Amended Rule 370.9 RoP reduces fee reimbursement to 50%, applying based on the reimbursement application date after December 31, 2025.
The Court of Appeal refrained from issuing a cost decision upon withdrawal where neither party formally requested such a determination.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Understanding the reduced fee reimbursement rate is essential for accurate litigation cost forecasting and settlement negotiations.
Practice note: Parties should explicitly request cost decisions during withdrawal proceedings to ensure formal resolution of financial liabilities.
What to monitor: Future jurisprudence regarding what constitutes a 'legitimate interest' for respondents opposing withdrawal under Rule 265.1.

items.title: LD Düsseldorf, May 12, 2026, Order, UPC_CFI_1747/2025
items.title_zh: UPC杜塞尔多夫分院裁定：临时禁令需证明单一产品侵权
items.title_en: UPC Düsseldorf: Single-Product Requirement and Burden of Proof in Clear Aligner Provisional Measures
items.summary: The applicant bears the burden of proof for infringement in provisional measures and must demonstrate with sufficient certainty that infringement is more likely than not (Art. 62 UPCA, R. 211 RoP)
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC杜塞尔多夫地方法院在2026年5月12日裁决中驳回申请人临时禁令请求。法院强调，申请人须充分证明侵权行为发生的可能性大于不可能性。针对隐形牙套专利，法院认定所有技术特征必须体现在单个产品中，不同阶段的牙套不能组合认定侵权。因申请人仅依赖宣传材料且缺乏具体技术分析，未能满足举证标准，法院未审理有效性等其他抗辩理由。
items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Local Division in Düsseldorf dismissed a request for provisional measures in patent infringement proceedings concerning clear aligner technology. The Court held that the applicant bears the burden of proving infringement is more likely than not under Article 62 UPCA and Rule 211 RoP. Crucially, the Court construed the method claim to require all features, including opposing counter moments, to be generated by the tooth receiving cavities of a single aligner. Evidence based solely on promotional materials and speculative witness statements, without independent technical assessment of the specific accused product, was deemed insufficient to meet this standard. The decision underscores that multi-stage treatment phases cannot be combined to establish infringement of a single-product claim.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国医疗器械企业出口欧洲时，应警惕UPC对‘单一产品’特征的严格解释。在应对临时禁令指控时，需准备详尽的技术比对分析，避免仅依赖营销材料。建议提前进行FTO分析，确保多阶段治疗方案不落入同一专利的单一产品权利要求范围，以规避高额诉讼风险。
items.ai_insight_en: This ruling clarifies strict evidentiary standards for preliminary relief at the UPC, particularly for multi-stage medical devices. Rights holders must provide detailed, product-specific technical analyses rather than relying on general marketing assertions. Defendants can challenge infringement allegations by highlighting the absence of feature-by-feature correspondence in individual products. The decision reinforces that claim construction focusing on a single physical embodiment prevents aggregating features from different treatment phases to prove liability.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["申请人承担临时禁令侵权举证责任，需证明侵权可能性大于不可能性", "方法权利要求的所有特征必须在单个对齐器中实现，不可跨阶段组合", "仅凭宣传材料和推测性证言不足以确立复杂技术领域的侵权事实"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Applicants bear the full burden of proof in provisional measures, requiring demonstration that infringement is more likely than not.", "Method claims construed as relating to a single product require all features to be present in one appliance, not across stages.", "Promotional materials and speculative assumptions are inadequate for establishing infringement in complex technical fields."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["重视UPC对单一产品特征比对的严格要求，避免跨阶段组合侵权风险", "完善技术证据链，避免仅凭营销材料应对复杂的专利侵权指控"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Rights holders seeking provisional measures must secure independent technical assessments of specific accused products early in proceedings.", "Practice note: Claim construction arguments should focus on whether all claimed features reside within a single physical unit or device iteration.", "What to monitor: How other UPC divisions apply the 'single product' requirement to other incremental or multi-stage therapeutic technologies."]
core_points_en: Applicants bear the full burden of proof in provisional measures, requiring demonstration that infringement is more likely than not.
Method claims construed as relating to a single product require all features to be present in one appliance, not across stages.
Promotional materials and speculative assumptions are inadequate for establishing infringement in complex technical fields.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders seeking provisional measures must secure independent technical assessments of specific accused products early in proceedings.
Practice note: Claim construction arguments should focus on whether all claimed features reside within a single physical unit or device iteration.
What to monitor: How other UPC divisions apply the 'single product' requirement to other incremental or multi-stage therapeutic technologies.

items.title: Court Of Appeal, April 30, 2026, Order Rejecting Appeal As Inadmissible, UPC_CoA_1/2026
items.title_zh: UPC上诉法院裁定驳回上诉：程序合规与费用担保标准
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal Rejects Adobe Appeal on Cost Security, Upholds Strict Procedural Compliance
items.summary: The Court of Appeal verifies ex officio compliance with the time limits and rules governing the appeal. When deciding on the admissibility of an appeal, an order rejecting the appeal as...
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）上诉法院在Adobe诉Keeex案中，裁定驳回上诉并确认程序规则需严格适用以保障法律确定性。法院依职权审查上诉期限，认定驳回裁定未超出请求范围。此外，法院重申原告与被告的相对财务状况不构成Rule 158下的费用担保考量因素。该判决强化了UPC程序规则的刚性，强调避免司法任意性，对后续涉及费用担保及程序合规的案件具有先例约束力。
items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Court of Appeal issued an order rejecting an appeal as inadmissible in proceedings between Adobe Inc. and Keeex SAS concerning cost security. The Court confirmed it verifies compliance with time limits and procedural rules ex officio. It held that rejecting an appeal as inadmissible does not exceed the scope of the claims. Furthermore, the Court reaffirmed that strict application of procedural rules ensures legal certainty and prevents arbitrary treatment. Crucially, the relative financial situation of the claimant compared to the defendant is not a valid criterion for assessing cost security under Rule 158 of the Rules of Procedure.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在应对UPC诉讼时，须严守程序期限，避免因技术性违规导致权利丧失。针对费用担保，不能仅凭双方财力差距抗辩，需准备实质性的胜诉可能性证据。建议加强内部IP合规流程，特别是跨境诉讼中的程序管理，以降低因程序失误带来的高额成本风险。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision reinforces the UPC's commitment to rigid procedural adherence to maintain legal certainty and equal treatment. For rights holders and defendants, it clarifies that financial arguments alone cannot override standard cost security requirements. Practitioners must ensure precise compliance with filing deadlines and procedural formalities, as the Court will actively enforce these rules without leniency based on party status or financial standing.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["法院依职权严格审查上诉期限与程序规则，确保法律确定性及非歧视原则", "驳回上诉作为不可受理裁定，不视为超出当事人诉讼请求的范围", "当事人相对财务状况不构成申请费用担保的法定依据，维持既往判例立场"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The Court of Appeal conducts an ex officio assessment of admissibility, verifying strict compliance with time limits and procedural rules governing appeals.", "An order rejecting an appeal as inadmissible is deemed within the scope of the claims and does not violate procedural boundaries under the Rules of Procedure.", "The relative financial disparity between claimant and defendant does not constitute a valid criterion for cost security assessments under Rule 158."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["严守UPC程序期限，规避因技术性违规导致的权利丧失风险", "费用担保抗辩需侧重胜诉可能性，而非单纯依赖财力对比"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Financial disparity between parties is insufficient to challenge cost security orders; substantive procedural compliance is paramount.", "Practice note: Ensure rigorous internal monitoring of appeal deadlines and procedural steps, as the Court reviews admissibility ex officio.", "What to monitor: Future applications of Rule 158 regarding cost security criteria and any potential shifts in the Court's strict interpretation of procedural rules."]
core_points_en: The Court of Appeal conducts an ex officio assessment of admissibility, verifying strict compliance with time limits and procedural rules governing appeals.
An order rejecting an appeal as inadmissible is deemed within the scope of the claims and does not violate procedural boundaries under the Rules of Procedure.
The relative financial disparity between claimant and defendant does not constitute a valid criterion for cost security assessments under Rule 158.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Financial disparity between parties is insufficient to challenge cost security orders; substantive procedural compliance is paramount.
Practice note: Ensure rigorous internal monitoring of appeal deadlines and procedural steps, as the Court reviews admissibility ex officio.
What to monitor: Future applications of Rule 158 regarding cost security criteria and any potential shifts in the Court's strict interpretation of procedural rules.

items.title: Central Division Paris accepts revocation action against expired patent
items.title_zh: UPC巴黎分部：过期专利撤销之诉若具法律利益仍属可受理
items.title_en: UPC Paris Confirms Admissibility of Revocation Actions Against Expired Patents
items.summary: Huntsman (Europe) BV and Huntsman Holland BV v BASF SE — Central Division Paris, 22 April 2026 (UPC_CFI_461/2025))
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC巴黎中央分部在Huntsman诉BASF案中裁定，即使涉案专利已过期，只要原告因追索过往侵权损害赔偿而保留合法法律利益，撤销诉讼即具可受理性。法院重申在创造性评估中不受专利自身技术问题表述限制，可独立界定客观技术问题。此外，辅助请求的审查仅限于针对修改后权利要求的具体无效攻击，不自动沿用对授权权利要求的异议。
items.ai_summary_en: In Huntsman v BASF, the UPC Central Division Paris ruled that a revocation action remains admissible even if the patent expired before filing, provided the claimant retains a legitimate legal interest. The Court found such interest existed because the defendant had initiated evidence preservation and announced damages claims for alleged past infringement. Additionally, the judgment clarified that the Court is not bound by the objective technical problem stated in the patent when assessing inventive step. Procedurally, it held that objections against granted claims do not automatically apply to amended claims in auxiliary requests.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业需警惕UPC程序灵活性，即便专利过期，对手仍可借撤销之诉清除障碍以索赔。应对时须精准论证法律利益缺失，并在答复辅助请求时聚焦具体修改点，避免异议范围不当扩大，强化程序抗辩策略。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision clarifies critical procedural boundaries for portfolio management and litigation strategy under the UPC framework. Rights holders must recognize that patent expiry does not automatically shield against revocation if past infringement liabilities are being pursued. For defendants, the ruling offers a pathway to clear patents from the register to mitigate historical damages exposure. Furthermore, the strict separation of validity attacks between granted and amended claims requires precise drafting of defenses and amendments, preventing the automatic carryover of broad invalidity arguments during proceedings.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["过期专利撤销案若为追索过往侵权赔偿，因具备法律利益仍可被受理", "法院在创造性分析中有权独立界定客观技术问题，不受专利文本束缚", "辅助请求审查限于针对修改权利要求的具体无效攻击，不自动继承异议"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Revocation actions remain admissible post-expiry if the claimant faces ongoing infringement or damages claims, establishing a continuing legal interest.", "The Court may independently determine the objective technical problem for inventive step analysis, rather than relying solely on the patent's formulation.", "When reviewing auxiliary requests, the Court limits its assessment to specific invalidity attacks directed at the amended claims, excluding general objections."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["警惕过期专利撤销风险，积极抗辩原告缺乏合法法律利益以阻断诉讼", "优化辅助请求答复策略，严格限定审查范围，防止无效理由不当扩展"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Patent owners should assess whether expired patents still pose litigation risks due to pending damages claims, as revocation actions remain viable tools for comp…", "Practice note: When responding to auxiliary requests, parties must tailor invalidity arguments specifically to the amended features, as prior objections to granted claims may not…", "What to monitor: Future UPC decisions defining the scope of 'legitimate legal interest' post-expiry and how courts independently formulate technical problems in complex inventive…"]
core_points_en: Revocation actions remain admissible post-expiry if the claimant faces ongoing infringement or damages claims, establishing a continuing legal interest.
The Court may independently determine the objective technical problem for inventive step analysis, rather than relying solely on the patent's formulation.
When reviewing auxiliary requests, the Court limits its assessment to specific invalidity attacks directed at the amended claims, excluding general objections.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Patent owners should assess whether expired patents still pose litigation risks due to pending damages claims, as revocation actions remain viable tools for comp…
Practice note: When responding to auxiliary requests, parties must tailor invalidity arguments specifically to the amended features, as prior objections to granted claims may not…

items.title: LD Helsinki, April 29, 2026, Order Disposing Of Provisional Measures Application, ACT_551054/2023
items.title_zh: UPC赫尔辛基地院：临时措施申请失去目的时予以处置
items.title_en: UPC Helsinki: Disposing of Provisional Measures Applications Devoid of Purpose Under Rule 360
items.summary: If a provisional measures application has become devoid of purpose and hence there is no longer need to adjudicate on it, the Court shall dispose of it based on R. 360 RoP...
items.ai_summary_zh: 2026年4月29日，UPC赫尔辛基地方法院就ACT_551054/2023案发布命令。法院依据《程序规则》第360条裁定，若临时措施申请已失去目的且无需再行裁决，应予以处置。若当事人请求，法院可作出费用决定，并酌情考虑实体案件已知结果。本案涉及AIM Sport Development AG与多家TGI Sport实体关于EP 3 295 663号专利的争议。
items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Helsinki Local Division issued an order on April 29, 2026, regarding application ACT_551054/2023. The Court held that if a provisional measures application becomes devoid of purpose, it must be disposed of pursuant to Rule 360 of the Rules of Procedure. Upon request by the parties, the Court may issue a cost decision, potentially considering the known outcome of the case on the merits. This proceeding involved AIM Sport Development AG against multiple TGI Sport entities concerning European Patent EP 3 295 663.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在应对UPC临时禁令时，需密切关注程序进展。若主案胜诉或和解，应及时主张临时措施失去目的以终止程序，避免不必要的费用支出。建议结合实体判决结果，积极向法院申请费用分担，优化跨境知识产权诉讼的成本控制策略。
items.ai_insight_en: This ruling clarifies the procedural mechanism for terminating provisional measures proceedings under the Unified Patent Court framework when the underlying urgency or purpose dissipates. For rights holders and defendants, understanding when an application is deemed 'devoid of purpose' is critical for managing litigation timelines and potential cost liabilities. The ability to link cost decisions to the merits outcome provides a pathway for resolving ancillary disputes efficiently once the primary legal questions are settled or mooted.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["临时措施申请若失去目的，UPC法院依R.360条应予处置", "法院可依当事人请求裁定诉讼费用，参考实体案已知结果", "本案涉及EP 3 295 663号专利，原告为AIM Sport，被告为多家公司"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Rule 360 RoP mandates disposal of provisional measures applications that have become devoid of purpose and no longer require adjudication.", "The Court may decide on costs upon party request, taking into account the known outcome of the main proceedings if available.", "The order addresses procedural efficiency in UPC local divisions when interim relief is no longer necessary due to case developments."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注临时措施目的丧失情形，及时申请终止程序", "利用实体案结果争取有利费用裁定，降低诉讼成本"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Parties should assess whether changes in factual circumstances or settlement progress render provisional measures applications obsolete to avoid unnecessary proc…", "Practice note: When requesting cost decisions after disposal under Rule 360, parties should explicitly reference any known outcomes on the merits to support their position.", "What to monitor: Future interpretations by other UPC Local Divisions regarding what constitutes an application being 'devoid of purpose' under Rule 360."]
core_points_en: Rule 360 RoP mandates disposal of provisional measures applications that have become devoid of purpose and no longer require adjudication.
The Court may decide on costs upon party request, taking into account the known outcome of the main proceedings if available.

items.title: Court Of Appeal, Standing Judge, April 28, 2026, Order On Request For Discretionary Review, UPC_CoA_56/2026
items.title_zh: UPC上诉庭裁定：错过期限的人为错误可获追溯延期
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal: Human Error in Deadline Calculation Warrants Retroactive Term Extension
items.summary: The Court of Appeal examines a request for discretionary review in a patent dispute between Optopol Technology and Topcon Corporation concerning EP 2 845 534. The case involves interpretation of procedural rules governing standing and review processes under the Unified Patent Court framework.
items.ai_summary_zh: 本案系Optopol与Topcon在统一专利法院（UPC）的专利纠纷。上诉庭审查了针对EP 2845534号专利的程序性请求。法院认定，尽管代理人助理系统录入失误导致错过期限，但律所已建立核查机制，该人为错误属可原谅情形。上诉庭支持地方法院决定，允许在权利恢复请求期内隐含提交追溯期限延长申请，强调此类申请应尽早提出，但在特定未决判例背景下具有合理性。
items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Court of Appeal, Standing Judge, reviewed a discretionary request concerning EP 2 845 534 in Optopol Technology v. Topcon Corporation. The Court upheld the Local Division's decision to grant a retroactive term extension under Rule 9.3 RoP. Although a deadline was missed due to an assistant's data entry error, the Court found this excusable because the law firm had established verification systems. The ruling confirms that such implicit requests filed within the re-establishment of rights period are reasonable, particularly when pending case law creates uncertainty regarding procedural timing.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在应对UPC诉讼时，需建立严格的期限双重核查机制以防范人为失误。若遇不可抗力或合理疏忽，应及时利用“可原谅错误”条款申请救济。同时，注意程序请求的时效性与独立性，避免过度依赖替代性请求策略，确保合规操作以降低专利失效风险。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision clarifies the threshold for 'excusable' errors in UPC proceedings, distinguishing between systemic failures and isolated human mistakes within robust compliance frameworks. For rights holders, it validates the strategy of filing alternative procedural requests during periods of legal uncertainty. However, the Court's emphasis on timeliness reinforces that reliance on such extensions remains exceptional rather than routine practice.

items.title_zh: UPC杜塞尔多夫地院2026年4月程序令：关于提交文件可采性的裁决
items.title_en: UPC Düsseldorf: Equality of Arms Requires Plaintiff Comment on Defendant's Late Rejoinder
items.summary: The admissibility of the documents and arguments submitted is a question of fact. Whether the defendant’s submissions in its rejoinder regarding the motion to amend are relevant...
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）杜塞尔多夫地方分院发布程序令（案号UPC_CFI_869/2025），涉及大日本印刷诉Zapp等公司专利侵权案。法院裁定，被告在反驳中针对修改动议提交的论据是否相关及是否逾期，属事实问题，需待口头程序结束后方能确定。依据武器平等原则，法院允许原告就被告的事实陈述补充评论，作为预防性措施，且不 prejudge 最终的可采性决定。
items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Düsseldorf Local Division issued a procedural order in Dai Nippon Printing v. Zapp regarding the admissibility of documents submitted in the defendant's rejoinder concerning a motion to amend. The court determined that assessing the relevance and timeliness of these submissions is a factual question requiring thorough analysis, which can only be conclusively resolved at the end of oral proceedings. To uphold the principle of equality of arms, the judge rapporteur granted the plaintiff a precautionary opportunity to comment on the defendant's statement of facts. This measure is without prejudice to the final decision on whether the defendant's additional arguments will be admitted into the record.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在应对UPC诉讼时，应高度重视程序规则的灵活性。即便对方提交材料可能逾期，法院仍可能基于公平原则给予我方回应机会。建议企业建立快速响应机制，充分利用程序赋予的评论权，同时密切关注法官对“武器平等”原则的适用尺度，以优化诉讼策略。
items.ai_insight_en: This order highlights the UPC's procedural flexibility in managing late-filed evidence under the Rules of Procedure. By deferring the final admissibility ruling while granting immediate comment rights, the court balances procedural efficiency with fair trial guarantees. Rights holders should note that 'equality of arms' may trigger additional briefing rounds even when opposing filings appear procedurally irregular, requiring agile case management during the early stages of litigation.

What to monitor: How different UPC Local Divisions apply Rule 9.2 and Rule 36 RoP regarding the threshold for admitting late arguments in rejoinders.

items.title_zh: UPC上诉法院裁定：上诉期自一审附理由判决作出之日起算
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal Clarifies Appeal Period Starts Upon Issuance of Reasoned Decision
items.summary: The Court of Appeal of the Unified Patent Court addresses procedural matters concerning time limits in an appeal case between Belkin International Inc., Belkin B.V., Belkin Limited and Koninklijke Philips N.V. The case involves European Patent EP 2 867 997 and concerns the application of Article 77(1) of the UPCA and various Rules of Procedure.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）上诉法院在Belkin诉飞利浦案中发布程序令，澄清《统一专利法院协议》第77(1)条及程序规则。法院裁定，上诉期限仅在一审法院发布附理由的判决书后才开始计算。理由是上诉人需依据判决理由根据程序规则制定救济请求。该裁决明确了上诉时效的起算节点，解决了此前关于期限计算的争议，为UPC诉讼程序提供了明确的法律确定性。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court Court of Appeal issued a procedural order in Belkin v. Philips, clarifying when the time limit for lodging an appeal begins. The Court held that under Article 77(1) of the UPCA and Rule 224.1(a) of the Rules of Procedure, the appeal period only starts once the Court of First Instance issues a reasoned decision. The judges reasoned that the grounds of the decision are indispensable for an appellant to formulate the remedy sought pursuant to Rule 225(e). This ruling resolves uncertainty regarding whether the clock starts upon the initial judgment or the subsequent reasoning.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在应对UPC诉讼时，需严格监控一审判决送达与理由公布的时间差。上诉倒计时并非从判决主文下达即刻启动，而是以完整理由书为准。建议建立专门流程跟踪UPC案件文书状态，避免因误判期限导致失权，同时利用此窗口期充分准备上诉策略。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision provides critical legal certainty for litigation teams managing UPC portfolios. By establishing that the appeal clock does not start until the full reasoned decision is available, the Court prevents premature expiration of appeal rights. Rights holders must adjust their internal case management workflows to track the specific date of the reasoned decision's issuance rather than relying solely on the initial judgment date to avoid procedural default.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["上诉期限仅在一审法院发布附理由判决后开始计算", "判决理由对上诉人制定救济请求不可或缺", "明确适用UPCA第77(1)条及程序规则相关条款"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The appeal period under Article 77(1) UPCA begins only when the Court of First Instance issues a reasoned decision.", "Rule 224.1(a) RoP requires the availability of decision grounds for appellants to properly formulate their remedy.", "The Court of Appeal confirmed that grounds are indispensable for complying with Rule 225(e) RoP requirements."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["严格监控UPC一审判决理由书发布时间以确定上诉期", "利用期限起算规则优化上诉策略并避免程序失权"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Ensures parties have adequate time to review judicial reasoning before committing to appellate proceedings.", "Practice note: Update docketing systems to trigger appeal deadlines based on the issuance date of the reasoned decision.", "What to monitor: Future applications of this principle to ensure consistent interpretation across different divisions of the Court."]
core_points_en: The appeal period under Article 77(1) UPCA begins only when the Court of First Instance issues a reasoned decision.
Rule 224.1(a) RoP requires the availability of decision grounds for appellants to properly formulate their remedy.
The Court of Appeal confirmed that grounds are indispensable for complying with Rule 225(e) RoP requirements.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Ensures parties have adequate time to review judicial reasoning before committing to appellate proceedings.
Practice note: Update docketing systems to trigger appeal deadlines based on the issuance date of the reasoned decision.
What to monitor: Future applications of this principle to ensure consistent interpretation across different divisions of the Court.
